title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on drug design tasks, including drug toxicity prediction, cancer drug discovery, antibody generation, and drug repurposing applications.
